# gate_id: # Coverage cells use covered:<literal token in test_file> or waived:<specific reason>.

waiver: waived:No dedicated plan-quality waiver path exists; template waiver is tested by the same fixture but does not waive the gate itself.
notes: Plan-quality gate remains hard; waiver gap is documented.

waiver: waived:No dedicated semantic-quality waiver exists because source relevance is a hard plan-quality requirement.
notes: Semantic source relevance is hard-gated for covered cases.

waiver: waived:No dedicated progress-lifecycle waiver exists; global workflow authorization is handled outside this checker.
notes: Progress lifecycle covers ordered positive flow plus missing, prefilled, final-backfill, and stale-final-evidence failures.

waiver: waived:No dedicated connector-evidence waiver exists; connector selection fallback is tested by required-connectors instead.
notes: Connector evidence coverage focuses on declaration and usage evidence.
Connector selection gate covers required, missing, invalid waiver, and valid waiver behavior.

waiver: waived:Dedicated skill-selection waiver is integration-tested through runtime-evidence because the standalone checker only validates route-plan fields.
notes: Standalone checker covers selection; runtime test covers waiver integration.

negative: covered:prewrite blocks declared connector without connector use
invalid: covered:prewrite fails closed on malformed PreToolUse JSON
waiver: covered:prewrite allows write when skill selection waiver present
notes: Runtime evidence has positive, negative, malformed JSON, and waiver cases.
Learning closure gate covers valid lesson, missing lesson, invalid lesson, and invalid waiver behavior.
Run trace coverage includes complete trace, missing trace, incomplete trace, and focused waiver behavior.

invalid: waived:Invalid policy coverage is separated into the rtk-context-invalid-policy extension row.
waiver: waived:RTK contract has no route-plan waiver path because the target project runtime contract is mandatory by design.
notes: RTK runtime contract coverage is split across base and extension rows.

waiver: waived:Readiness audit coverage is inventory validation; waiver is not supported because removing required rows must fail CI.
notes: Readiness inventory is intentionally non-waivable; classification rules are fixture-tested.

waiver: waived:Installer contract is a deterministic CI contract and does not expose a waiver path by design.
notes: Installer contract has no user-facing waiver path.
Post-merge validation has positive, missing trigger, missing repair-loop, and explicit waiver coverage.
